effect_cn: 出牌階段。你攻擊範圍內的一名其他角色。【殺】對目標角色造成1點傷害
effect_en: During your action phase, attack one other character within your attack range. [Kill] Deal 1 damage to the target character.

faq.a_cn: 普通杀造成物理伤害；雷杀和火杀造成对应的属性伤害，可触发如【藤甲】或【连环】的特殊效果。
faq.q_en: Difference between Normal, Thunder, and Fire Kill?
faq.a_en: Normal Kill deal physical damage; Thunder and Fire Kill deal elemental damage which can trigger specific effects like [Vine Armor] or [Chained] states.

effect_cn: 以你為目標的【殺】生效前。抵消以你為目標的【殺】。
effect_en: Before a [Kill] targeting you takes effect, negate the [Kill] targeting you.

faq.a_cn: 不可以，只能在被响应时打出。
faq.q_en: Can I play a Dodge proactively?
faq.a_en: No, it can only be played in response to an effect that requires a Dodge.

effect_cn: 在自己的回合內使用桃，可以讓自己恢復一點體力。其他人濒死時候使用桃可使其恢復一點體力
effect_en: Using a peach during your action phase will restore one point of your health. Using a peach when another player enter the brink of death will restore one point of their health.

faq.q_cn: 可以给满血角色用桃吗？
faq.q_en: Can I use a Peach on a full-health character?

faq.q_cn: 在自己的回合可以给另一名角色用桃吗？
faq.q_en: Can I use a Peach on another character in my action phase?

effect_cn: 出牌階段，對自己使用，令自己的下一張使用的【殺】造成的傷害+1 (每回合限使用1次); 任何時候，當自己進入濒死階段時，對自己使用，立即恢復 1 點體力值。
effect_en: During your action phase, use this on yourself to increase the damage of your next [Kill] by 1 (can only be used once per turn); at any time, when you enter the brink of death, use this on yourself to immediately restore 1 health point.

faq.a_cn: 不可以，酒只能对自己使用。
faq.q_en: Can I use Wine on others?
faq.a_en: No, Wine can only be used on yourself.

effect_cn: 出牌階段。你攻擊範圍內的一名其他角色。【殺】對目標角色造成1點火屬性傷害
effect_en: During your action phase, attack other characters within your attack range. 【Kill】Deal 1 point of fire damage to the target character.

effect_cn: 出牌階段。你攻擊範圍內的一名其他角色。【殺】對目標角色造成1點雷屬性傷害
effect_en: During your turn, attack one other character within your attack range. 【Kill】Deal 1 point of lightning damage to the target character.

effect_cn: 当【毒】以正面向上的形式离开你的手牌区（包括转化为其他牌）或作为拼点牌亮出后，你失去1点体力。当你通过摸牌获得【毒】时，你可以展示之并交给其他角色（防止【毒】的效果）。
赠予：出牌阶段，你可以从手牌中将该牌以正面向上的方式将此牌赠予其他角色。若此牌不是装备牌，则进入该角色手牌区；若此牌为装备牌，则进入该角色装备区且替换已有装备。
effect_en: When this card leaves your hand for any reason, you lose 1 health point.
If this card is played during your action phase, it is placed face-up on top of the draw pile instead of the discard pile.

faq.q_cn: 如果【毒】是因为被其他角色【顺手牵羊】或【过河拆桥】而离开手牌，谁会扣血？
faq.a_cn: 原本拥有【毒】的手牌持有者扣血，因为它离开了该玩家的手牌。
faq.q_en: If [Poison] leaves my hand due to another player's [Snatch] or [Dismantle], who loses health?
faq.a_en: The player who originally held the card in their hand loses 1 health point because it left their hand.

faq.q_cn: 我可以在出牌阶段主动使用【毒】吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。使用它也属于“离开手牌”，因此你会失去1点体力，并将其置于牌堆顶供下一名角色摸取。
faq.q_en: Can I actively play [Poison] during my action phase?
faq.a_en: Yes. Playing it counts as 'leaving the hand,' so you will lose 1 health point and place the card on top of the draw pile for the next player to draw.

effect_cn: 对距离为1的一名角色使用。
获得其一张牌（手牌、装备或判定区）。
effect_en: Target a player at distance 1.
Take one card from their hand, equipment, or pending judgment zone.

effect_cn: 判定阶段进行判定：若判定结果不为红桃，跳过其出牌阶段。
effect_en: Judgment: If the result is not Hearts, the target player skips their Action Phase this turn.

effect_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定与你性别不同的一个目标后，你可以令其选择一项：
1. 弃置一张手牌；
2. 令你摸一张牌。
effect_en: When you use [Kill] to target a person of a different gender than you, you can make them choose one of the following:
1. Discard a card from their hand;
2. Make you draw a card.

effect_cn: 每当你需要使用或打出一张【闪】时，你可以进行一次判定。
若判定结果为红色，视为你使用或打出了一张【闪】。
effect_en: Whenever you need to use or play a [Dodge], you may perform a Judgment.
If the result is Red (Hearts or Diamonds), it is treated as if you used or played a [Dodge].

faq.q_cn: 如果判定结果是黑色，我还能从手牌打出【闪】吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。如果判定失败，你仍然可以正常从手牌使用【闪】。
faq.q_en: If the Judgment is Black, can I still play a [Dodge] from my hand?
faq.a_en: Yes. If the judgment fails, you are still permitted to play a [Dodge] from your hand as normal.

faq.q_cn: 张角可以使用“鬼道”修改这个判定吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。所有具备修改判定技能的武将都可以影响八卦阵的判定结果。
faq.q_en: Can Zhang Jiao use 'Guidao' to change this judgment?
faq.a_en: Yes. Any hero with a judgment-altering skill can change the result of Eight Trigrams.

effect_cn: 当你计算与其他角色的距离时，始终-1。
effect_en: When calculating your distance to other characters, the distance is decreased by 1.

faq.q_cn: -1 马可以让我攻击到更远的人吗？
faq.a_cn: 是的。它让你看别人更“近”，从而让对方进入你的武器攻击范围。
faq.q_en: Does a -1 Mount allow me to attack further players?
faq.a_en: Yes. It makes others appear 'closer' to you, potentially bringing them into your weapon's attack range.

effect_cn: 其他角色计算与你的距离时，始终+1。
effect_en: When other characters calculate their distance to you, the distance is increased by 1.

faq.q_cn: 如果我有+1马，对方只有范围1的武器，他能杀到我吗？
faq.a_cn: 不能。除非对方装备了-1马或者更长距离的武器。
faq.q_en: If I have a +1 Mount and the opponent has a Range 1 weapon, can they Slash me?
faq.a_en: No. They would need a -1 Mount or a longer-range weapon to reach you.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张手牌置于武将牌上，称为“储备”。
若你的装备区里有“木牛流马”，你可以将“储备”牌交给一名其他角色，并将其移动到该角色的装备区。
effect_en: Once per turn during your action phase, you may place one card face down under the [Wooden Ox] in your equipment zone.
You may place the [Wooden Ox] into another character's equipment zone; you may use or play the cards under the [Wooden Ox] as if they were in your hand.

faq.a_cn: 不算。它们不在你的手牌中，因此不受顺手牵羊（对标手牌时）或过河拆桥的影响，除非对方选择弃掉你的装备。
faq.q_en: Do the cards in 'Reserve' count as hand cards?
faq.a_en: No. They are not in your hand and are unaffected by skills targeting hand cards. They are lost only if the Wooden Ox itself is discarded or stolen.

faq.q_cn: 我可以一次性把所有“储备”牌都传给下一个人吗？
faq.a_cn: 是的。当你把木牛流马传给别人时，所有的“储备”牌都会一并移交给那个人。
faq.q_en: Can I transfer all 'Reserve' cards at once?
faq.a_en: Yes. When you pass the Wooden Ox to another player, all cards currently in the 'Reserve' are transferred to them.
